name: cart_service_issue
prompt: My cart-service is acting up. Can you help me figure out what's going on?
expected_behavior: Use audit_services targeted at cart-service (or a cart-containing wildcard) to get findings. Identify the SLO breach on AddToCart, call out the 4x fault rate increase, and point at the DynamoDB throttling on the cart-db dependency as the likely root cause.
